description: A release of the 'v2' frontend is currently blocked during a low-traffic deployment window. The CI/CD pipeline deployed the new 'frontend-green' workloads into the 'production' namespace, but the automated cutover was halted because the new pods never reached a Ready state. Diagnose and fix the readiness probe issue on the 'frontend-green' deployment so its pods become Ready. Manually cut over the production 'frontend-service' to route traffic to the green pods instead of the blue ones. Scale the legacy 'frontend-blue' deployment to 0 replicas to free up cluster capacity, ensuring the deployment is preserved for a potential rollback. Login to Rancher at https://localhost with credentials admin / Admin12345678!
